backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a visual theme refresh applied across all frontend components, listing the affected files, related components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend file describing the warm spice/terracotta visual theme changes applied to styles, Tailwind config, and all React components.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, border, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Rama's Idly & Dosa Batters' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages basket state (add, update quantity, clear) and composes all page sections including Navbar, Hero, Products, and BasketSummary.
frontend/src/components/AboutUs.tsx: About Us section component displaying a two-column story layout with an image, accent card, and four value cards (Fresh, Natural, Hygienic, Authentic) using spice/saffron theming.
frontend/src/components/BasketSummary.ts: Fixed bottom-right collapsible basket panel showing item list with quantity controls, a saffron total price, and a WhatsApp order CTA button that builds a pre-filled message URL.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a grid of info cards (address, phone, hours, WhatsApp), a spice-styled WhatsApp CTA button, and an embedded Google Maps iframe.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Renders a fixed floating WhatsApp button in the bottom-left corner with a tooltip on hover and animated pulse rings, linking to a WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, product list, and contact details, including WhatsApp and Zomato CTA buttons.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Renders the full-screen hero section with a background image, brand logo, tagline, star rating, and CTA buttons for WhatsApp ordering and product browsing.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Renders a fixed responsive navbar with smooth-scroll navigation links, active section highlighting on scroll, and a WhatsApp order CTA button with a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Offers.tsx: Renders a special offers section featuring a Sunday special banner and three offer cards with descriptions, tags, and WhatsApp/Zomato order links.
frontend/src/components/Products.tsx: Renders a product grid of batter items with quantity selectors and an add-to-basket action, passing selected items up via an onAddToBasket callback prop.
frontend/src/components/Reviews.tsx: Renders a customer reviews section with a grid of four hardcoded testimonial cards, each showing a star rating, quote, and customer avatar for a South Indian batter brand in Vijayawada.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Displays a dark-themed section with six feature cards highlighting the brand's selling points such as natural ingredients, traditional fermentation, no preservatives, and home delivery.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with status tracking across the React app.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark brand tokens, and declares reusable utility classes for buttons, cards, and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom brand color palettes (spice, saffron, ink, cream), display/body font families, custom box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the full project state (version 21) for Rama's Idly & Dosa Batters single-page website, including feature list, architectural notes, color scheme, WhatsApp ordering integration, and business details for Vijayawada.
